generated_oml:
instance HorizontalCartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Step‑per‑motor driving the horizontal cart axis of the lab‑scale gantry crane."
]

instance VerticalHoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Step‑per‑motor driving the vertical hoist axis of the gantry crane."
]

instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller that receives step and direction signals for the horizontal cart motor."
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller that receives step and direction signals for the vertical hoist motor."
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Swing‑angle encoder mounted on the hoist to measure azimuth."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EncoderTelemetry
]

instance AnemometerSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Low‑cost anemometer to monitor wind speed."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AnemometerTelemetry
]

instance EncoderTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance AnemometerTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AnemometerSensor
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterfaceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Python‑based service translating high‑level trajectory commands into motor controller signals."
    DTDFVocab:provides MotorControlInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computes optimal trajectories for container pucks using the kinematic model."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight, TrajectoryCommandAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Executes dynamic simulation of the crane motion to produce virtual trajectory data."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationOutputInsight
]

instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs real‑time sensor data into the TimescaleDB database."
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance MonitoringDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualises crane state through Grafana dashboards."
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance ValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Performs continuous validation comparing measured actuator positions to model predictions."
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight, OperatorAlertAction
]

instance GantryCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD representation of the lab‑scale gantry crane geometry generated with Autodesk Fusion 360."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonRuntimeEnabler
]

instance GantryKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Symbolic kinematic model capturing the crane's geometry and motion constraints used for trajectory generation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonRuntimeEnabler
]

instance DynamicTrajectorySimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic simulation model of the crane motion used to produce virtual trajectory data for comparison with real execution."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonRuntimeEnabler
]

instance EncoderTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series log of swing‑angle encoder readings stored in TimescaleDB."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, PythonRuntimeEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData EncoderTelemetry
]

instance AnemometerTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series log of anemometer wind‑speed readings stored in TimescaleDB."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, PythonRuntimeEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData AnemometerTelemetry
]

instance MosquittoBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker used for inter‑component messaging."
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, ValidationService
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB PostgreSQL time‑series database for logging sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance PythonRuntimeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker‑based Python runtime environment executing twin services."
    DTDFVocab:enables PhysicalCraneInterfaceService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ValidationService
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Computed optimal trajectory plan for container puck movement."
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Result of continuous validation comparing measured actuator positions to model predictions."
]

instance OperatorAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Alert sent to operators when validation detects deviation from expected behavior."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical log of sensor data for trend analysis and predictive maintenance."
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live state visualisation of the crane shown on Grafana dashboards."
]

instance MotorControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Signal sent to motor controllers to enact trajectory commands."
]

instance TrajectoryCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to transmit trajectory commands to motor controllers."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SimulationOutputInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight generated from simulation output for comparison with real motion data."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service are executed by the Control Application via the Physical Crane Interface. The specific command formats, validation, authentication, feedback, conflict resolution, or execution confirmation mechanisms are not described in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Docker Compose orchestrates three containers: a TimescaleDB instance (PostgreSQL with time‑series extension) for permanent storage of telemetry and control logs, an Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for real‑time messaging between the Arduino on the crane and the software stack, and a web‑based dashboard for runtime visualization and supervisory control.  Two Python applications run on the host PC: one is a logging daemon that consumes MQTT messages and writes them into TimescaleDB; the other is an HMI that serves the web dashboard and exposes REST endpoints for external interfaces."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "A Continuous Validation Service runs in parallel to the crane operation, continually comparing the real‑world trajectory telemetry against the virtual trajectory generated by the Simulation Service. It computes a distance metric (e.g., Euclidean distance between corresponding pose samples) and applies a predefined acceptance threshold. If the metric exceeds the threshold, the service notifies operators via the operator dashboard, enabling rapid investigation and corrective action."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The system uses an MQTT broker for inter-service signaling and a TimescaleDB server as the data store. The document mentions MQTT and the database protocol but does not detail network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, or security requirements for the communication infrastructure."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The system is deployed on on‑premise hardware running Python applications, TimescaleDB, Grafana, and an MQTT broker. No cloud or edge deployment details are provided. Computational and storage requirements, scalability mechanisms, and redundancy are not specified in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "External integration is achieved via the MQTT protocol.  The Arduino publishes sensor telemetry and receives control commands on MQTT topics (e.g., crane/status, crane/command).  External clients, such as operator stations or other systems, can subscribe to or publish on these topics for real‑time interaction.  Historical data can be queried from TimescaleDB through standard SQL over the network.  No additional enterprise or cloud integration (e.g., Azure) is defined in the exemplar."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The GreenhouseDT exemplar employs open‑source tools: InfluxDB for time‑series data storage and ActiveMQ as a message broker, deployed via virtual machine images. The Air Quality Management exemplar is based on an AutomationML digital twin model and uses Microsoft Azure services. No explicit industry‑standard compliance, certification, or interoperability frameworks are documented in the provided excerpts."
]
